lineups.title: Abbys_b-default
lineups.description:
1. Go to corner of the nest
2. Put your bow out, put the middle of your bar on the "highest brick"
(like you see in the picture)
3. Make it so it bounces once, Fully draw your bow, and just shoot
4. Profit!

lineups.title: Post Plant A Generator Lineup
lineups.description:
Use this lineup to stall the defuse when the spike is planted next to Generator.
1. Stand against the radianite boxes in A Lobby (image 1).
2. Place the bottom of the Snake Bite icon on the corner of the explosion (image 2).
3. Fire your Snakebite or a 2 bar 0 bounce Shock Bolt (if using Sova, aim slightly lower for step 2).
Used by V1 effys in VCT Masters Reykjavik.

lineups.title: A Site Plant Denial Double Shock
lineups.description:
1. Stand against the edge of this wall in CT spawn
2. Align bottom left charge bar with tip of roof on the building, 3 bar
3. Wait exactly 4.5 seconds (Use counting strategies below)
4. Align right tip of right bounce diamond with right valley of the roof tile as shown, 2 bar

Counting Strategies: 
Using the form "1 Mississippi" count until "4 Miss," then fire
Using the form "1 Tick-Tock" count until "4 Tick," then fire

lineups.title: Viper Toxin From A Garden to A Wine
lineups.description:
Use this toxin with a killjoy ult to get kills or flush them out of wine
1. stand next to box as shown on image 1
2.line up as shown on image 2 and throw (don't sprint or jump)
3.lands in A wine which flushes anyone out

lineups.title: Viper Molly From B Lobby to Boxes
lineups.description:
1. Stand in this corner of B lobby
2. Aim your crosshair like on an image 2
3. Do a normal throw

lineups.title: Top mid to Default A Viper Post Plant
lineups.description:
1. Stand in the corner behind the green box at Top Mid.
2. Aim the left tip of your right hud on the top corner of the metal band going around the building.
3. Do a normal throw and this will land in front of Generator.

lineups.title: Post-plant B Dice From Back of B Lobby
lineups.description:
1. In B lobby, stand in the corner with the octopus.
2. Overlay the Snakebite ability diamond on the piece of wood sticking out the left side of the broken building. 
3. Normal shot.

lineups.title: Post-plant A Dice From A Lobby
lineups.description:
1. Stand in the corner against the double boxes.
2. Aim your cross-hair at the top-left corner of the ledge with the potted plants (the mollie will fly over the ledge).
3. Normal shoot. Mollie will bounce off the wall on A site and land dice. Lands in ~2 seconds.

lineups.title: B Lobby to Default Post Plant
lineups.description:
1. Stand in the corner close to the entrance of B Main.
2. Aim the right tip of your right HUD line onto the tip of the left fish's mouth.
3. Do a NORMAL throw and this will land to cover Default Plant.

Why am I using a lineup when it isn't planted for me? Don't ask me lol I just make the lineups.

lineups.title: Wine to Dice Post Plant
lineups.description:
1. Stand in the back corner of Wine.
2. Aim the right tip of your left HUD line onto the crevice.
3. Do a NORMAL throw and this will land onto Dice Plant.

lineups.title: Lineup to Clean Market in Attack
lineups.description:
1. Stand in this corner. (First image)
2. Align the tip of the orb with this tile. (second image)
3. Simply left click

lineups.title: Sova Defense Cross-map Shock + Reveal
lineups.description:
1. Get into the corner before rotating from rafters to B
2. Shock Dart: You look up to the corner of the roof and align your top left charge-bar and do a simple 2-charge
3. Recon Dart: Now you just lower your charge bar a bit so it touches the concrete and do the same 2-charge
4. Now you have easy darts to help your teammates while being on the other site

lineups.title: Brick Side Under Heaven Shock
lineups.description:
1. Stand in this general area of heaven
2. Aim into the middle of the box and on the metal part at the top as shown
3. 3 bar 2 bounce

lineups.title: Ascent B Plant Stall From A Tree
lineups.description:
1. Stand in the corner of the wooden pallet below window.
2. Aim the left tip of your C ability's hud line on the top left corner of the balcony.
3. Do an instant jump throw and this will land perfectly in front of Dice

At this point I recommend doing a second lineup to corner plant, as people tend to go there when mollied off of dice.

4. Stand in the same place, and aim the RIGHT tip of your C ability's hud line in the middle of the shadow of the right window.
5. Do an instant jump throw and it will land in corner plant.

6. Final result if both mollies are shot one after the other

lineups.title: Ascent a Lobby to Hell Plant Molly
lineups.description:
1. Stand in front of the green box in lobby.
2. Aim the right tip of your left hud line on the top right of the piece of metal with a circular thing in the middle.
3. Shoot normally and the molly will land in front and slightly inside of A Hell.

Credits to Jinzled on Youtube (On streams not any specific video)

lineups.title: Post-plant A Generator From Attacker Spawn
lineups.description:
1. Stand on the ping with the table-thing in front of you.
2. Aim your cross-hair inside the "U" formed by the broken roof.
3. Jump & immediately shoot.

Note: Mollie takes a while to travel and is too far away to hear the defusal sound. This line-up should be used in anticipation of a defuse and not reactively.

lineups.title: Wine to B Default Plant
lineups.description:
1. Stand in the back corner of Wine.
2. Aim the tip of your smoke orb on the TIP of the crevice.
BIG WARNING: PRACTICE THE POSITIONING IN CUSTOMS. IF YOU AIM TOO FAR TO THE RIGHT IT WILL BOUNCE BACK AND YOU WILL MOLLY YOURSELF.
3. Do a NORMAL throw and this will land to cover Default Plant.

lineups.title: A Lobby to Behind Dice Attack Molly
lineups.description:
1.Stand in the corner in front of the radianite box.
2. Aim the right tip of your right HUD line onto the 2nd line down in the window.
3. Do a NORMAL throw and this will COMPLETELY clear behind Dice.

lineups.title: Viper Molly Post Plant From B Lobby
lineups.description:
1. Back yourself against this corner on B Lobby
2. Point to the center of the light patch of the house
3. Do a normal throw

lineups.title: B Main to Default Post Plant
lineups.description:
4 Second Travel Time

1. Stand In Middle
2. Aim Middle of Metal

lineups.title: Cubby to Dice Post-plant Molly
lineups.description:
1. Stand in the corner in Cubby.
2. Aim the left tip of your right HUD line onto the corner of the pattern.
3. Do a NORMAL THROW and the molly will land to cover Dice.

lineups.title: Wall Side Under Heaven Shock
lineups.description:
1. Stand on the plank on heaven and in between the two vertical planks as shown
2. Aim into the middle of the diamond on the radianite crate
3. 3 bar 2 bounce

This shock takes into consideration that enemies do not stand in the back corner, they stand towards the wall such that they aren't visible

lineups.title: Ascent A Default Stall From Spawn
lineups.description:
1. Stand on the tip of the Inner corner of bricks on the ground closest to Pizza
2. Aim the right tip of the left hud line around the middle of the last brick going downward closest to the arch. (This is not super percise)
3. Fire with no jump and it will land in front of generator.

lineups.title: Ascent Cubby to A Safe Gen
lineups.description:
1. Stand in the corner of cubby closest to the dog.
2. Aim the left tip of your right hud line at the VERY bottom left corner of the metal piece below the radio looking thing.
3. Do a normal throw, and the molly will land in safe gen.

lineups.title: Ascent B Retake Viper Mollies
lineups.description:
1. Stand in the corner of the inner floor concrete closest to CT.
2. Aim the left tip of your right hud line onto the corner of the building.
3. Do a normal throw, and this will cover the left archway into Boathouse.

4. Aim the right tip of your right hud line on where the rope meets the edge of the roof.
5. Do a normal throw, and this will land on the right archway of Boathouse.

These are both used much more effectively when you also use an orb lineup with them, to make sure they dont push the orb.

lineups.title: Post-plant A Generator From Wine (tricky)
lineups.description:
1. Stand in the back-corner of wine
2. Line up your:
      - cross-hair on the frame of the canopy
      - left-most line of your HUD vertically with the light bulb
3. Normal shoot.

Note: You can be seen by people peeking from A main, so be aware of your situation  (see vision cone on image 2).

lineups.title: Ascent Mid to B Site Plant
lineups.description:
1. Stand in the corner beside the stair in mid courtyard.
2. Aim the top dot of the click icon between the two spikes.
3. Left click and the molly will land in front of the two boxes on site.

lineups.title: Viper Molly From A Lobby to Boxes
lineups.description:
1. Stand in this corner of Box in A lobby
2. Aim the line of your abilities bar like on the image 2
3. Do a jump throw

lineups.title: Brim's Molly From a Main to A's Haven.
lineups.description:
1. Go to the Green box, on a main.
2. Aim at the cloud,  like as the 2rd picture. 
3. Shoot and you will safe haven behind the box on a.

lineups.title: Ascent Market to A Dice Plant Delay
lineups.description:
1. Stand in the corner on top of the boxes to the left of the door inside Market.
2. Aim the left curving tip of the right hud line onto the top right corner of the stain that doesnt have more stains around it. (Two pictures for better reference)
3. Do a normal throw, and this will hit in front of dice.

Great if the enemy team likes planting dice. You must really be in a bad position to use this as a post plant lineup...

lineups.title: Stall Defuse A Site Truck
lineups.description:
Stall the defuse when the spike is planted next to truck from the safety of A Short using Viper&#44 Brim or Sage.
1. Stand as shown in image 1 on the ledge in A Short.
2. Place your crosshair just to the right of this building (image 2).
3. Fire your molly or a two bar zero bounce shock dart.

lineups.title: Bind Viper Post Plant Long to B Default
lineups.description:
1. Plant the Spike on B Site Default (Image 1)
2. Stand in the corner on B Long (Image 2)
3. Align the corner of your Wall bar with the white on the wall (Image 3)

lineups.title: Bind A Short to Triple Viper Post Plant
lineups.description:
1. Stand on top of the short platform on the left side of short.
2. Aim the left tip of the hud line between your smoke and wall icons onto the top right of the bottom solar panel.
3. Do a normal throw and this will hit Triple Plant.

Edit: Still works!

lineups.title: Post Plant: B (middle)
lineups.description:
1. Standing in the middle of the wall (Image 1).
2. Point the smoke icon at the pole (Image 2).
3. it will land in the center of the box in B site (Image 3).

lineups.title: Stall Default A Truck Defuse
lineups.description:
1. Stand in the corner of these 2 boxes in A Lobby.
2. Crouch and look at the middle of the leaf in the wall and go a bit right (image 2). 
3. Crouch fire your Snakebite&#44 Slow Orb or a 2 Bar Shock Dart.

lineups.title: Bind A Short to Truck Plant Viper Post Plant
lineups.description:
1. Stand on the short platform in the left corner of short.
2. Aim the left tip of the left hud line onto the far right handle of the water valve.
3. Do a normal throw and this will land in front of Truck Plant.

lineups.title: Defender Spawn to A Default Anti-plant
lineups.description:
1. Stand in the corner in front of the barrels.
2. Aim the top left tip of your Ultimate icon into the corner of the metal beams.
3. Do a NORMAL THROW and this will cover default plant.

lineups.title: Shock Dart / Recon on B Site
lineups.description:
1. put yourself on the flower
2. place the logo of the shooter on the reactor 
3. shot with 2 charges and 0 bounce

lineups.title: Rotating From A Deny B Plant
lineups.description:
This lineup is great to deny the plant in B default when rotating from A

1. Stand in the corner of the traffic cone and barrel
2. Aim the diamond of the smoke icon at the top of the right part of the ladder
3. Fire, lands in ~5 seconds

lineups.title: Stall A Boxes Default Defuse
lineups.description:
1. Stand in the corner of the boxes and the wall in A Lobby (image 1).
2. Look at the middle of this patch of leaves&#44 you cant tell it apart from the others due to it having more holes in it (image 2).
3. Shoot your Snakebite/Slow Orb/A 2 Bar Shock Bolt.

lineups.title: Stall B site default defuse from B long
lineups.description:
Prevent the defuse of the spike using this lineup from B long.
1. Stand by the up-right plank in the corner in B long. (Image 1)
2. Use your right distal hud to lineup with the stain on the wall. It's difficult to see but there is a pair of small stains side-by-side near the center of the metal panel. (Image 2)
3. Fire your Snakebite, Slow Orb or a 2 Bar 0 Bounce Shock Bolt. (Image 3)

Note:  The snake bite takes ~6 seconds to land. You cannot wait until you hear the defuse sound to shoot it. For two consecutive snake bites without a gap, count 6 seconds before shooting the other.

lineups.title: Outside CT to B Anti-plant
lineups.description:
1. Stand on the line in front of the poster.
2. Aim slightly down and to the right of the spike.
3. Do a NORMAL THROW and this will land to delay plant.

Credit to nAts, god of viper, for this lineup.

lineups.title: Bind B Middle Plant From B Short Viper Post Plant
lineups.description:
1. Stand in front of the box by the TP.
2. Aim the left tip of your left hud line on the corner of the dark stain on top of the slightly lighter stain. (Three pictures for better reference)
3. Do a normal throw and the molly will hit middle plant.

lineups.title: Bind B Short to Right Side Default Viper Post Plant
lineups.description:
1. Stand in front of the green boxes by TP.
2. Aim the left tip of your left hud line on the bottom of the first wood spike sticking out of Hookah's roof. (Two pictures for better reference.
3. Do a normal jump throw, and this will land in the Right side of site's default plant.

lineups.title: Molly for A Bind
lineups.description:
1. go on this corner at the top of this barrel
2. place the point of your smoke at the top of this lantern
3. shoot your molly, it lands on the spike

lineups.title: Bind B Short to Left Side Default Viper Post Plant
lineups.description:
*Works much better on high detail but is displayed in low detail to display that it works in low detail.

1. Stand in front of the box by TP.
2. Aim the left tip of your left hud line on the corner of the faint stain below the short dark stain on the roof of Hookah. (Three pictures for better reference.)
3. Do a normal throw, and this will hit right side default.

lineups.title: A Showers From A Short
lineups.description:
1. Start by going to A Short
2. Go to the marked location
2. Look at the shown location by aligning the UI
3. Shoot your shock bolt/recon bolt at the shown settings
4. The shock bolt/recon bolt will end up getting to the location shown in the last image

lineups.title: Prevent B Site Default Defuse
lineups.description:
1. Crouch in the corner of the boxes and the wall in B Window&#44 you should not able to be seen by enemies in B Hall.
2. Look at the piece of wood sticking out of the wall in the ceiling and look down and left of it a bit&#44 as shown in image 2 (it should be around halfway between the edge of the ceiling and the plank).
3. Throw your Snakebite&#44 Slow Orb or a 2 Bar Shock Bolt.

lineups.title: Fountain to Middle Default Post Plant
lineups.description:
1. Wedge yourself into the corner on Fountain.
2. Aim the raised part of your left HUD line onto the black stain, not super precise so don't worry.
3. Do a NORMAL THROW and this will land to cover Middle Default.

lineups.title: Fountain to Left Side Default Post Plant
lineups.description:
1. Wedge yourself into the corner on Fountain.
2. Aim the right tip of your left HUD line onto the bottom brown corner.
3. Do a NORMAL THROW and this will land to cover left side Default.

lineups.title: A Lobby to Defaut Post Plant
lineups.description:
1. Stand in the corner in front of the box.
2. Aim the upward facing line on your left HUD line onto the corner of the leaf.
3. Do a NORMAL THROW and the molly will land to cover Default Plant

lineups.title: Molly for B Bind
lineups.description:
1. go on this corner
2. place the point of your molly at the top of this lantern
3. shoot your molly, it lands on the spike

lineups.title: Bind Viper Post Plant A Teleport to A Boxes
lineups.description:
1. Plant Spike at Boxes (Image 1)
2. Stand behind the wooden boxes at TP (Image 2)
3. Line the white line in your wall bar up with the white dot of the tower (Image 3)

lineups.title: A Lobby to Triple Post Plant
lineups.description:
1. Stand in the corner in front of the box.
2. Aim the left tip of your right HUD line onto the corner of where the railing meets the building.
3. Do a NORMAL THROW and the molly will land to cover Triple Plant.

lineups.title: Left Side Short to Gate Corner Execute
lineups.description:
1. Stand in the corner on the box in Short.
2. Aim the right tip of your HUD line between the wall and ult icons onto the corner of the brick.
3. Do a NORMAL THROW and the molly will land to cover Gate.

lineups.title: Viper Molly Fracture Default A Side
lineups.description:
1. Stand in front of this line
2. Line up the right corner 
from the Molly fire HUD to 
the bottem from the line 
between the two ones
3. Just Left click 
(it lands in 5 sec)

lineups.title: Attacking Spawn to A Default (1)
lineups.description:
1. Stand in front of the pinged line (image 1).
2. put the bottom of your diamond (on your molly hud) on top of the line in (image 2)
3. Fire the molly. It should take 5 seconds to and start dealing damage.

lineups.title: From B Main to B Boxes
lineups.description:
1.STAND AT THE MARKED PLACE OF THE BOX
2.AİM MARKED PLACE
3.END

lineups.title: Shock Dart From Spawn to B Site
lineups.description:
1. stand in the corner 
2. regardez entre les feuilles
3. shot with 2,5 charges and 0 bounce

lineups.title: Prevent Default B Defuse From B Main
lineups.description:
1) Stand in front of crack on the wall behind the box in B main. (Image 1) 
2) Line up with the branch sticking out from the left wall and the leaves sticking out from the wall with the light on it. (Image 2)
3) Throw your snake bite, 2 bar 0 bounce shock dart or slow orb and it will land in 3 seconds.

lineups.title: Drop to A Default Fracture
lineups.description:
1. Stand in this corner in Drop
2. Align the line in your HUD to the corner in the roof
3. Normal shoot

lineups.title: Viper Default Molly Lineup for Defenders on A Site
lineups.description:
1. Go into this corner as shown
2. Line up the right bottom corner of the toxin bar with the metal piece shown in the image (Regular throw)
3. Where the molly lands

lineups.title: Viper Default Molly for B Site for Attackers
lineups.description:
1. Line up ur self with this line in Arcade
2. Line up ur crosshair with this leaf as shown (Regular throw)
3. Where the molly lands

lineups.title: B Bench to B Default (1)
lineups.description:
1. Stand in the corner on the bench (image 1).
2. Put the top right corner of your toxin bar in the right side of the 0, where the paint re-appears (image 2).
3. Fire the molly. It should take 3.5 seconds to land and start dealing damage.

lineups.title: Two Molly Lineups From the Same Spot to A Site up and Under
lineups.description:
a) under
b) up
1. Stand in this corner in dish
2a. Aim between these bars
2b. Aim at the end of the 3rd bar
3. Normal throw

lineups.title: Prevent B site default plant defuse from Canteen
lineups.description:
This molly covers default plant on B site to stop anyone defusing.
1. Stand on the lighter mark of the moss patch in canteen. (Image 1)
2. Place your crosshair at the center of the leaf that intersects the gap on the roof. (Image 2) 
3. Throw your snake bite, slow orb or a 2 bar 0 bounce Shock Bolt. (Image 3)

This lineup lands in ~5 seconds.

lineups.title: Attack Bridge to B Site Default
lineups.description:
1. Stand above the edge of this moss. 
2. Aim the reticle above this tiny leaf, and halfway at the edge of the metal part to the right. 
3. Shoot. 

Optional: Pairs well with a oneway smoke above default.

lineups.title: Attacking Spawn to A Default (2)
lineups.description:
1. Stand in front of the pinged line (image 1).
2. put the right line of your target icon (on your molly hud) on top of  the metal wall line (image 2).
3. Jump and fire the molly. It will take 5 seconds to land and start dealing damage.

lineups.title: Drop to Safe Post Plant
lineups.description:
1. Stand near the corner near the edge of Drop.
2. Look at the line beside where the tip of the logo is.
3. Do a NORMAL THROW and this will land to cover Safe Plant.

lineups.title: Dish to top Site Post Plant
lineups.description:
1. Stand in the corner near the entrance of Dish.
2. Aim the right tip of your left HUD line onto the middle of the metal wire and the dish on the line.
3. Do a NORMAL THROW and the molly will land to cover top site Plant.

lineups.title: Post-plant B Tree to B Default Molly (3)
lineups.description:
1. Stand in the middle of the left side of the metal pipe (image 1).
2. Place the top right corner of your toxin bar on the edge of the pinged leaf (images 2 & 3).
3. Fire the molly. It should take 5.3 seconds to land and start dealing damage.

lineups.title: Tree to Behind B Dice Execute
lineups.description:
1. Stand in the corner on the left side of Tree.
2. Aim slightly to the right of the first tiny spike on the tree.
3. Do a NORMAL THROW and the molly will land behind Dice.

lineups.title: Easy Post Plant B Lineup
lineups.description:
Use this lineup to defend the default plant spot, it is very versatile and can be used on many agents.
1. Stand on the corner of this box in B Main (image 1).
2. Look at the middle of this box in yellow and aim slightly down (image 2).
3. If you are playing Killjoy, Raze or KAY/O running throw your molly and if you are playing any other agent throw your molly normally. For Sova aim slightly more down and do a 0 bar 1 bounce shock dart. It will land as shown in image 3.
Credits to MrLowlander on YouTube.

lineups.title: A Belt to A Default (post Plant)
lineups.description:
1. Align yourself with the middle of the wall.
2. Aim your crosshair with the most right dark grey line and a bit down so it aligns with the vertical line, see picture 2 for reference.
3. Left Click!

lineups.title: Across the Map Pre-plant for Default B
lineups.description:
While rotating to B, throw this molly to delay plant.
1. Stand in the doorway of screens/mid
2. Aim the right side of poison bar with the bot-right edge of the dark gray bar (image 2)
3. Throw the molly.

lineups.title: Stall Plant From A Screens
lineups.description:
1. Wedge yourself into the back corner of screens.
2. Line up your bottom right HUD line with the small line break in the screens.
3. Standard left click to fire, or 2-bar Shock Dart.

lineups.title: Icebox Post Plant A Ramp to Default Plant (box + Rope)
lineups.description:
1. Stand against the wall somewhat straight
2.

lineups.title: Postplant From A Main to A Site
lineups.description:
1. Stay in middle of this wall
2. Look up to middle of this line 
3. Throw molly

lineups.title: Icebox A Rafter to Default Post Plant
lineups.description:
1. Stand close to the right wall of Raftors.
2. Look anywhere in the top half of the leftmost line on the wall.
3. Do a RUNNING throw, and this will land on Default (Safe) Plant.

Alternatively, do a normal throw and it will (partially) land on Genny Plant.

lineups.title: Post Plant B Site
lineups.description:
1. Stand in the middle of the side of this door

2. Aim right next to the cargo, aling your crosshair between the 2 upper white caracteres

3. Shoot ! (For sova's main, 1 charge / 1 bounce)

lineups.title: A Rafters Sloworb Lineup
lineups.description:
1. Stand against the left side of the right entrance to A site. (Walk up against the ping.)
2. Align your crosshair with the middle of the black line along the ceiling.
3. Fire. Rafters is now slowed c:

lineups.title: Icebox Viper Post Plant to A From Main
lineups.description:
1. Run into wall and line it up straight
2. Lineup crosshair half way between the the cross in the ceiling tiles just under the shadow.
3. It covers both default corner box and rope plant

lineups.title: T Side A Stairs to A Nest
lineups.description:
1. Stand in the corner.
2. Aim at the ledge in the middle, between the 2 arrows.
3. Left click and activate your Poison Orb on the spike.

lineups.title: Icebox Snakebite for A Site if Rotating From B
lineups.description:
1. Stand in Corner
2. Aim a little above the line on the ceiling tile
3. Should cover most common plant location (Box + Rope)

lineups.title: Shock Dart/early Recon From Attacker Side Spawn to B Yellow
lineups.description:
1. Stand in this corner (Picture 1)
2. Aim the right corner of the right diamond at this shadow (Pictures 2/3)
3. Shoot with full charge and 2 bounces

lineups.title: Easy Lineup With Sova,viper and Brim
lineups.description:
1. Stand on top of these barrels
2.Aim at the left side of this specific arrow with your crosshair
3 shoot but with sova is a jump shot with one bar

lineups.title: Viper Molly and Sova Dart From Attacker Side to A Site
lineups.description:
1. Plant here, and place your smoke
2. Stand against this wall and align your crosshair like this
3. Move your crosshair up to aim here
4. Jump and throw the molly
Sova:
Fire with one bounce and 1 charge

lineups.title: Attackers Spawn to B Site Back
lineups.description:
1. Stand On The Corner Of The Box Near Attacker Side Spawn
2. Align The Left Bottom Line Of Your HUD With The Up Left Corner Of Number 1
3. Left Click

lineups.title: Post Plant A Main to A Default
lineups.description:
1. Stand in this corner of the A Main
2. Line up your crosshair like in the image 2
3. Shoot it and it should go to the A Default - It takes about  3-4  seconds to land

lineups.title: Post Plant A Main to A Default
lineups.description:
1. Stand in this corner of the A Main 
2. Line up your crosshair like in the image 2 (if you look close to my crosshair you can see a brighter pixel that you can line up)
3. Shoot it and it should go to the A Default - It takes about 2-3 seconds to land 

!!!The line up does not go directly in to the rope but it can work if you plant the spike while looking to the Heaven (sorry for my bad english again :D)!!!

lineups.title: Post Plant Molly B Site
lineups.description:
1. (go to the corner of B site)
2. (Look and aim a little above the corner of the orange part)
3. (and just throw)

lineups.title: Mid/under Tube Slow Orb
lineups.description:
1. Stand on the right side of the kitchen window overlooking under tube.
2. Look at the middle of the dark grey line underneath tube.
3. Throw slow orb. This slows the area under tube, as well as any attackers trying to talk up mid.

lineups.title: Snake Bite From B Back to Back Yellow
lineups.description:
1. Stand at the corner (See Image 1)
2. Look at the right tail of the HP HUD (See Image 2)
3. Stand still and throw

lineups.title: A Site God Anti-plant Viper Molly
lineups.description:
1. Stand in the corner near the doorway.
2. Aim slightly above the joint on the roof.
3. Left-click.

This molly hits Default, Rope and Generator plant spots.

lineups.title: Icebox A Ramp to Nest *high Graphics Only
lineups.description:
1. Stand in the far right corner of the entrance of A site.
2. Aim your crosshair in between the 2 tiles on the line. 
3. Do a normal throw, and this will land on Nest Plant.

lineups.title: A Pipe Icebox
lineups.description:
1. stand on this line up against the wall
2. line up with the middle line and with the other line
3. jump and shoot

lineups.title: Viper Molly B Site Post-plant
lineups.description:
1. Stand in the middle line
2. Align the right line on the Yellow/Black sticker
3. Normal left click

lineups.title: Snake Bite From B Back to B Main (top Box)
lineups.description:
1. Stand at the corner (See Image 1)
2. Look at the HUD dash between C and Q skills (See Image 2)
3. Stand still and throw

lineups.title: B Safe Universal Defuse Denial From Close Garage
lineups.description:
1. Go behind this box in Garage
2. Walk back until this green sign is aligned with the top of the box (no precision needed)
3. Stop, throw. Lands in ~3 seconds

Works for every heavy molly.
Works for Viper Orb and snakebites.
Works for Phoenix molly
Works for Sova 1-bounce HALF-charge

Credit to BrimSensei

<link id=3749>Same lineup but for the exposed plant</link>

lineups.title: Post Plant B Site
lineups.description:
This lineup is great for stalling the defuse when the spike is planted default on B site.
1. Stand in the corner near this booth in B lobby.
2. Aim at the lower right corner of the green screen.
Can also be combined with Poison cloud.

lineups.title: Post-plant A Lobby to A Default Molly
lineups.description:
1. Stand in the corner of the pinged spot (image 1).
2. Aim the bottom left corner of your toxin bar with the corner of the blue spot (image 2).
3. Fire the molly. It will take 5.2 seconds to land and start dealing damage.

lineups.title: Viper Molly a Side Post Plant
lineups.description:
1. stand in A lobby next to this flowerpot.
2. place the middle hud line on the middle light.
3. left click.

lineups.title: B Safe Plant Denial or Defuse Stall From Heaven
lineups.description:
1. Align the left door side to the orange sign, doesn't need to be precise
2. Aim in the middle of the Chinese lamp and the door wall. The height doesn't matter very much, but I like to aim around the barely visible shadow's corner
3. Run forward until you're almost exposed, throw while running
4. Prevents enemies planting behind the box OR stalls defuse

- Works with all kinds of mollies and 1-bounce-0-charge shock darts

Credit to Perry2N

lineups.title: B Exposed Universal Defuse Denial From Garage
lineups.description:
1. Go behind this box in Garage
2. Walk back until this green sign is aligned with the top of the box (no precision needed)

Heavy Mollies/Viper Orb/Harbor Cove:
- Aim at this pipe junction
- TAP W then immediately throw

Sova Shock dart:
- Aim at this pipe junction
- 0-bounce 1-charge or a bit less

Brim Molly/Viper Molly/Sage Slow
- Aim here
- Standard throw

Works for Phoenix Molly and Fade Seize as well

<link id=2608>Same lineup but for the Safe Plant</link>

lineups.title: B Lobby to B Open Plant
lineups.description:
1. Stand against the trash can.
2. Aim the HUD line at the dots shown in image 2.
3. Left-click.

lineups.title: Viper Molly a Lobby Post Plant
lineups.description:
1. stand in A loby next to this flowerpot.
2. place the shoot icon from the hud on the end of the leave
3. left click

lineups.title: B Heaven to Plant Denial Shock
lineups.description:
1. Stand in this spot of heaven and move until you can just see the rope
2. Aim at the white strip on the pipe
3. 2 bar 1 bounce

lineups.title: A Site Defuse Denial Double Shock
lineups.description:
1. Stand on top of this plant in the corner of A Lobby
2. Aim in the cross-section of the tip of the building and the left edge of the blue horizontal line, 2 bar
3. Align bottom tip of left bounce diamond at the point where the bars cross as shown, 1 bar
4. Fire shocks immediately, no delay needed

lineups.title: Safe Plant Universal Lineup
lineups.description:
1. Stand in the corner behind the safe box in Garage.
2. BACK UP until you see the pipes on the walls (while hugging the left wall).
3. Aim HALFWAY DOWN the metal below the 2nd pipe rung.
4. Do a NORMAL throw on any agent (EXCEPT SOVA and KAY/O) and the molly, seize, or slow will land on Safe Plant. (Brim molly trajectory)
5a. For Sova, aim slightly ABOVE the pipes, 1 bounce 1.5 charge.
5b. Viper molly traj. (Still hits all of bomb)
5c. Viper orb traj
5d. Sage slow traj
5e. Phoenix molly traj
5f. KJ molly traj
5g. For KAY/O, aim 2/3 down instead of 1/2 down.
5h. KAY/O molly traj
5i. Harbor Cove traj
5j. Fade Seize traj
5k. Gekko molly traj.
5L. Deadlock crouch traj.

lineups.title: Viper Molly a Site Post Plant
lineups.description:
1. stand in A loby next to this flowerpot. 
2. place the top flame of the wal ability on the spot between these bushes. (picture 2)
3. left click

lineups.title: B Lobby to B Open Plant Alternative Molly
lineups.description:
1. Stand against the metal.
2. Aim the bottom right HUD line at the corner of the pipe and the sign.
3. Left-click.

lineups.title: Defender Spawn to B Default
lineups.description:
1. Stand in front of the middle concrete post (image 1).
2. Align the top left corner with where the wire and the corner of the window meet (image 2).
3. Jump and fire the molly. It should take 5.5 seconds to land and start dealing damage.

lineups.title: Post Plant B Main to B Default
lineups.description:
1.  Stand in this corner of the B Main
2. Lineup your crosshair like in the image 2
3. Shoot it and it should go to the C Site - It takes about 2-3 seconds to land

!!!Sorry for not posting lineups!!!

lineups.title: Split B Alley to B Site
lineups.description:
1. Stand in this corner of B Alley
2. Aim with the first small line of your Toxin bar at the triangle marked in picture 2
3. normal left click

lineups.title: A Screens to Corner Plant
lineups.description:
1. Stand in the back corner of the room beside Screens.
2a. Aim at the top hole in the neon sign.
2b. Picture for clarity.
3. Do a NORMAL throw and this will land to cover Corner Plant.

lineups.title: Post-plant A Lobby to Site 3 Locations
lineups.description:
1. Corner of Plant
2. 1cm from blue line
      a.Heaven spike left of blue line
      b.Default spike under blue line
      c.Default  spike above blue line
3. 5 seconds to land

lineups.title: A Ramps to A Main Anti-rush Molly
lineups.description:
1. Wedge yourself in this corner in A Ramps
2. Aim at the top of this square thing where it intersects the apartment's side.
3. Quickly lands in A main's choke (get ready to fight for Heaven control)

- Works for all lightweight mollies: Brim, KAY/O, Killjoy, Viper snakebite
- Works with heavy mollies BUT you aim at the leftmost corner of the rectangle instead: Gekko mosh pit, Sova shock dart 1-bounce-0-charge, Harbor, Viper poison orb

lineups.title: A Ramps to A Corner Plant Defuse Stall
lineups.description:
1. Wedge yourself in this corner in A Ramp
2. Align the leftmost ability separator with this dot
3. Standard throw for Brim/Viper, 2 charges for Sova

lineups.title: Garage to Default Easy Post Plant Molly
lineups.description:
1. Stand in the corner behind the metal box.
2. BACK UP until you can barely see below the roofing, then look in the center of the wood.
3. Do a NORMAL THROW and the molly will land to cover Default.

lineups.title: Post Plant A Default
lineups.description:
This lineup is great for stalling the defuse when the spike is planted on one of the two default spots. 
1. Stand in A Lobby as shown in image 2 
2. Place your crosshair on the bottom left of the light if the spike is planted behind the pillar/wall (image 3) or at the far top right of the light if the spike is planted behind the screen (image 4)
3. Shoot your Snake Bite or a 2 bar 0 bounce Shock Bolt.

lineups.title: Mid Stairs Double Shock
lineups.description:
1. Stand in this corner of A Ramp
2. Aim close to the left wall while being in line with the tall building in the background as shown, 3 bar 1 bounce
3. Immediately run to vents and stand until it is possible to see all of the stairs leading to B Heaven
4. Aim anywhere between the blue line and the ending line of the stairs on the right wall as shown, 3 bar 2 bounce

A certainly confusing lineup, but useful to get those quick picks on aggressive Mid pushes. Consider trying this lineup in a custom to get a feel for and speed of hitting the shocks.

Credit to Snapiex

lineups.title: A Lobby to Behind TV Post Plant
lineups.description:
1. Stand in the corner behind the planter box.
2a. Aim parallel to the blue light on the edge of the yellow light.
2b. Line for clarity.
3. Do a NORMAL THROW and the molly will land to cover Behind TV plant.

lineups.title: Viper Molly a Side Post Plant
lineups.description:
1. stand in A loby next to this flowerpot. (picture 1)
2. look at the line and remeber it. (picture 2)
3. place the right line of the hud on that line (picture 3). it is very precise. if it is to high it wil  land on the roof of the caffé. i suggest to practice it in custom game.
4. left click.

lineups.title: A Lobby to A Box
lineups.description:
1. Stand in the pinged corner (image 1).
2. imagine a 90 degree angle coming from the end of the white building's corner and the right side of the tower light (image 2).
3. Fire the molly. It should take 5 seconds to land and start dealing damage. 

creds to WildBreadMen.

lineups.title: A Lobby to Safe Plant Post Plant
lineups.description:
1. Stand in the corner behind the planter box.
2. Aim the right tip of your left HUD line onto the bottom of the white tower.
3. Do a NORMAL THROW and the molly will land to cover Safe Plant.

lineups.title: A Lobby to For-heaven Post-plant Molly
lineups.description:
1. Stand in the corner behind the planter box.
2a. Aim in-between the left side of the glowing light and the white neon tower.
2b. Line for clarity.
3. Do a NORMAL THROW and the molly will land to cover for-heaven plant.

lineups.title: Viper Molly a Side Post Plant
lineups.description:
1. stand in A loby next to this flowerpot.
2. place the right hud line on the right light.
3. left click.
